cleavage agent: Proteins in the SDS-PAGE band between 62 and 98 kDa were in-gel digested with trypsin
enrichment method: immunopurified from MORC-depleted extracts using anti-Flag affinity chromatography
fractionation method: further purified using spin filtration with a 30 kDa cutoff and gel filtration chromatography
instrument: peptides were analyzed by online nanoliquid chromatography coupled to MS/MS (Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano and Q-Exactive Plus, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
labeling: Proline was then used to perform a MS1 label-free quantification of the identified protein groups
